[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110011111 7
1 111011101 7
2 101000101 4
3 111100111 7
4 110111111 8
5 010110111 6
6 000011110 4
7 100000010 2

01 10 110100110 5
12 21 010110111 6 match 5
23 32 000010110 3
34 43 000000010 1
45 54 100000000 1
56 65 100000101 3
67 76 100000001 2
70 07 100000000 1

02 20 010100110 4
13 31 000011110 4 match 6
24 42 000000010 1
35 53 000011100 3
46 64 100000000 1
57 75 100000001 2
60 06 101000100 3
71 17 100000001 2

03 30 000000110 2
14 41 100000010 2 match 7

36 63 000000100 1
47 74 100000000 1
50 05 110000100 3
61 16 100000101 3
72 27 000000001 1

04 40 100000010 2 match 7
15 51 110011101 6
26 62 000000101 2
37 73 000000000 a
